title: M2 — Final models persisted + cards blessed
source: hackathon-pm M0 bootstrap 2026-05-28; roadmap in plan eres-un-product-manager-bubbly-floyd.md
why: Cards reference one fitted joblib but the H4 orchestrator only persists per-fold artifacts. Need a final-fit-and-persist step + a bless_card script. Prerequisite: >=1 enabled asset in deployment_config.yaml (all currently disabled) or a manual risk-officer-reviewed card.
value_rationale: Critical path to live paper-trading for the AI Engine Quantitative Hack; H = directly gates competition participation.
scope: scripts/persist_final_models.py: fit_calibrated on full event set, dump models/<name>.joblib + <name>.columns.json
scripts/bless_card.py: deployment block -> validated card in contracts/cards/

history.reason: Superseded by the no-alpha survival-book pivot. final-fit joblib persistence + bless_card require fitted ML models and >=1 enabled asset; the survival book has NO fitted models (weights via inverse-vol/vol-target). Not applicable to the deployed vehicle.
@ chore(backlog): reconcile M1-M7 execution epic with the survival-book reality
chore(backlog): reconcile M1-M7 execution epic with the survival-book reality
